items.title: Health insurance sector records Strong growth momentum with premiums exceeding ₹1.2 lakh crore in 2024-25
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Finance Health insurance sector records Strong growth momentum with premiums exceeding ₹1.2 lakh crore in 2024-25 Prescribed timelines and regulatory measures aim to ensure efficiency and fairness in Health insurance claim settlements Posted On: 26 MAR 2026 12:34PM by PIB Delhi India’s health insurance sector continues to witness robust growth, grow ing at a rate of …
